title: $idpart
text: $idpart Return the ID part of an associative list item. $idpart ( AssociativeListItem ) Return Values ID part of an associative list item. Use Allowed in all component types. Description For more information, see Lists and Sublists . Example: Extracting the ID and Value of an Associative List Item The following example shows how the $valuepart function can be used to extract the value part of an associative list item: $1 = $idpart("Key=TheData") $2 = $valuepart("Key=TheData") ; results: ; $1 = "Key" ; $2 = "TheData" Copy Related Links List Handling in ProcScript Uniface provides ProcScript instructions that enable you to build lists, retrieve items from lists, and sort lists based on various criteria. Associative Lists Each item in an associative list consists of a pair of associated values separated by an equal sign (=), such as a property and its value, or a value and its representation. getitem Copy an item from a list to a field or variable. $item Return the value that corresponds to a given ID in an associative list. $valuepart Return the value part of an associative list item. $itemnr Return the list item that corresponds to a given index number in a list.
